name: Hejazi Arabic
notes: Hejazi Arabic (حجازي). Western Saudi Arabia: Mecca, Medina, Jeddah. Urban Hejazi: ج → /dʒ/; ق → /ʔ/ (Jeddah) or /q/ (Medina). ث → /t/, ذ → /d/ (urban); preserved in Bedouin/rural. No k → /tʃ/ shift (unlike Gulf). Cosmopolitan due to Hajj pilgrimage: heavy influence from Egyptian, Levantine, South Asian Arabic speakers. Often considered most internationally intelligible Peninsula dialect.
